meaning: adj.腰部的n.腰动(静)脉,腰神经,腰椎
examples: Lumbar support is very important if you're driving a long way.
Investigate the clinical efficacy of proximal needling and ventouse treating lumbar gluteal myofascitis.
The sagittal reconstruction was performed with all the 79 lumbar disc lesions of lumbar vertebrae and rumpbone vertebrae.
Look for cars that have comfortable seats, with multi-position adjustments, including selectable seat height and lumbar support.
The number of lumbar fusions, to name one procedure, tripled from 1990 to 2001, reaching 120, 000 that year.
